sentences.target: Tu as un cheveu sur ton pull.
sentences.reading: /ty a œ̃ ʃəvø syʁ tɔ̃ pyl./

translations.fr: Tu as un cheveu sur ton pull.
translations.ipa: /ty a œ̃ ʃəvø syʁ tɔ̃ pyl./
translations.en: You have a hair on your sweater.
translations.es: Tienes un pelo en el suéter.
translations.de: Du hast ein Haar auf deinem Pullover.
translations.ko: 네 스웨터에 머리카락 하나 붙어 있어.
translations.yue: 你件毛衣上面有條頭髮。
translations.pt: Você tem um fio de cabelo no suéter.
translations.vi: Trên áo len của bạn có một sợi tóc.
translations.nl: Er zit een haar op je trui.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे स्वेटर पर एक बाल है.
translations.el: Έχεις μία τρίχα στο πουλόβερ σου.
translations.nb: Du har et hår på genseren.
translations.sv: Du har ett hårstrå på tröjan.
translations.ro: Ai un fir de păr pe pulover.
translations.da: Du har et hår på trøjen.
translations.ja: セーターに髪の毛が一本ついている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'un cheveu' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'cheveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'as'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('sur ton pull'); modifies the noun phrase 'un cheveu'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; agrees in gender/number with 'pull'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Il y a un cheveu dans la soupe.
sentences.reading: /il i a œ̃ ʃəvø dɑ̃ la sup./

translations.fr: Il y a un cheveu dans la soupe.
translations.ipa: /il i a œ̃ ʃəvø dɑ̃ la sup./
translations.en: There is a hair in the soup.
translations.es: Hay un pelo en la sopa.
translations.de: In der Suppe ist ein Haar.
translations.pt: Há um fio de cabelo na sopa.
translations.vi: Có một sợi tóc trong súp.
translations.nl: Er zit een haar in de soep.
translations.nb: Det er et hår i suppen.
translations.id: Ada sehelai rambut di dalam sup.
translations.sv: Det är ett hårstrå i soppan.
translations.ro: Este un fir de păr în supă.
translations.da: Der er et hår i suppen.
translations.ja: スープに髪の毛が一本入っている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic pronoun functioning as a locative complement within 'il y a'.
Verb (present 3rd sg) forming the existential 'il y a'; takes 'un cheveu' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'cheveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'a' in the existential construction.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans la soupe'); modifies the NP 'un cheveu'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'soupe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Je retire un cheveu de ta veste.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁətiʁ œ̃ ʃəvø də ta vɛst./

translations.fr: Je retire un cheveu de ta veste.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁətiʁ œ̃ ʃəvø də ta vɛst./
translations.en: I’m taking a hair off your jacket.
translations.es: Te quito un pelo de la chaqueta.
translations.de: Ich nehme ein Haar von deiner Jacke.
translations.it: Ti tolgo un capello dalla giacca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把你夹克上的一根头发拿掉。
translations.yue: 我幫你喺件褸上面拎走一條頭髮。
translations.ru: Я сниму с твоей куртки волосок.
translations.pt: Vou tirar um fio de cabelo da sua jaqueta.
translations.vi: Tôi lấy một sợi tóc trên áo khoác của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik haal een haar van je jas af.
translations.uk: Я зніму з твоєї куртки волосину.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी जैकेट से एक बाल निकाल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βγάζω μία τρίχα από το μπουφάν σου.
translations.nb: Jeg tar bort et hår fra jakken din.
translations.id: Aku mengambil sehelai rambut dari jaketmu.
translations.sv: Jag tar bort ett hårstrå från din jacka.
translations.ro: Îți iau un fir de păr de pe geacă.
translations.da: Jeg fjerner et hår fra din jakke.
translations.ja: あなたのジャケットから髪の毛を一本取ります。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'un cheveu' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'cheveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'retire'.
Preposition introducing a source PP ('de ta veste'); indicates origin of removal.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; agrees with feminine noun 'veste'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: On voit un cheveu sur le gâteau.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ ʃəvø syʁ lə gato./

translations.fr: On voit un cheveu sur le gâteau.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ ʃəvø syʁ lə gato./
translations.en: We see a hair on the cake.
translations.es: Vemos un pelo en el pastel.
translations.de: Man sieht ein Haar auf dem Kuchen.
translations.it: Si vede un capello sulla torta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们看到蛋糕上有一根头发。
translations.yue: 見到蛋糕上面有條頭髮。
translations.pt: Vemos um fio de cabelo no bolo.
translations.tr: Pastanın üzerinde bir saç teli görünüyor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy có một sợi tóc trên bánh.
translations.nl: We zien een haar op de taart.
translations.hi: केक पर एक बाल दिख रहा है.
translations.el: Φαίνεται μία τρίχα πάνω στην τούρτα.
translations.nb: Man ser et hår på kaken.
translations.id: Terlihat sehelai rambut di atas kue.
translations.sv: Man ser ett hårstrå på tårtan.
translations.ro: Se vede un fir de păr pe tort.
translations.da: Man kan se et hår på kagen.
translations.ja: ケーキの上に髪の毛が一本見える。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; here used as colloquial 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); takes 'un cheveu' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'cheveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('sur le gâteau'); modifies the NP 'un cheveu'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'gâteau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.
